query: SELECT tenantId, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN assignedUserId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as assigned FROM wa_conversations GROUP BY tenantId ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT tenantId, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN assignedUserId IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as assigned FROM wa_conversations GROUP BY tenantId ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10;
